description: §18.8.2 — a `match` over a struct FIELD of enum type (`match p.role` where `role: Role`) SHALL NOT fire E-TYPE-024: the subject resolves to the field's enum type, a matchable subject. Acceptance sibling of e-type-024-struct-subject-pos: proves the struct-subject rejection is scoped to whole-struct subjects, not enum-typed member access.
rationale: §18.8.2: an enum-typed subject (a struct field accessed via `.role`) is matchable, so the struct-subject check is correctly silent.
